name: SCC_SECCDiscoveryReq
title: SCC_SECCDiscoveryReq
syntax: void SCC_SECCDiscoveryReq ( dword Security, dword TransportProtocol )
description: The callback is called as soon as a SECC Discovery Request is received.

parameters.name: TLSEnabled
parameters.description: 1 for TLS, 0 for no transport layer security
